results.evidence: ac-progress-sync.ts:128 — skipGitHubComments guard skips postACProgressComments, autoClose at :144 always runs
ac-progress-sync.ts:65-68 — SyncProgressOptions interface with skipGitHubComments, passed through at :342,:373
ac-progress-sync.ts:168,236 — JIRA/ADO accept _options but ignore skipGitHubComments. Tests verify in ac-progress-sync.test.ts
sync-progress.ts:277,338,469 — githubStep5Succeeded=false by default, set true only on success. On error, skipGitHubComments=false
With skipGitHubComments=true, postACProgressComments (4 calls/US) is skipped entirely. 7 US × 4 = 28 calls saved
github-us-auto-closer.ts:128 — ensureLabelExists called once before closeCandidates loop at :133
github-us-auto-closer.ts:51 — verifiedLabels Set with cacheKey check at :291, resetLabelCache exported at :54
github-us-auto-closer.ts:175-184 — single gh api PATCH with state=closed + labels[] args replaces separate close+edit
github-us-auto-closer.ts:115-118 — storedStatus check skips before any API call. parseIssueLinks reads status at :266
github-us-auto-closer.ts:161-166 — completion comment still posted. :170-173 — labels preserved. Tests verify in auto-closer.test.ts
github-ac-checkbox-sync.ts:189-191 — if (body === originalBody) continue; skips both updateIssueBody and addComment
github-ac-checkbox-sync.ts:195-217 — updateIssueBody + addComment only execute when body !== originalBody (changes exist)
